description_long: This is a Kalashnikov-style assault rifle featuring a wooden fixed stock and handguard, paired with a black metal receiver and barrel assembly. The rifle has a curved detachable box magazine, typical of AK-pattern firearms, and a prominent front sight post with a protective hood. The receiver cover and gas tube are finished in matte black, contrasting with the natural wood grain of the stock and foregrip. The pistol grip is also wooden, matching the rest of the furniture, and the trigger guard is clearly visible. The muzzle is fitted with a slotted flash hider, and the rifle is equipped with standard iron sights.
description: A Kalashnikov-style assault rifle with wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved magazine. Features iron sights and a slotted flash hider.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden furniture, magazine, and receiver details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
